title: Spicy Creamy German Duck Grill
description: A romantic grilled duck breast glazed with a spicy, creamy mustard sauce that balances heat and richness in a classic German style.
instructions: In a bowl whisk together sour cream, lemon juice, honey, mustard, garlic, ginger, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, and Worcestershire sauce until smooth.
Score the duck breasts on the skin side and season both sides with salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat. Sear the duck, skin side down, for 3‑4 minutes until the skin is crisp.

Flip the duck and grill for another 3 minutes, then spoon the prepared sauce over the breasts and continue grilling, basting with sauce, for 2‑3 minutes until the internal temperature reaches 165 °F (74 °C).
Remove from heat and let the duck rest for 5 minutes. Slice the breasts against the grain.
Drizzle extra sauce over the slices and garnish with chopped parsley. Serve immediately with your choice of sides.
